titleStmt.title: SII 9.210: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 210. (A.R. No. 708 of 1919.) ON A SLAB IN THE KESAVASVAMI TEMPLE AT HOLALAGUNDI, ALUR TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 50, Viśvāvasu, Māgha śu. 1, Sukravāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa. The date is irregular. Māgha śu. 1. in Viśvāvasu corresponded to A.D. 1125 December 27, Sunday, not Friday, as stated, and there was no solar eclipse in that year. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribuvanamalladēva and states that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Daśavarmadēvarasa, bearing many titles, made a gift of some plots of land, a garden and an oil-mill for the service of the god Brahmēśvaradēva of Hoḷalukoṇḍe set up by Dharmave, wife of Bammeya-Gāvuṇḍa. A certain Mārtaṇḍa-nṛipa is extolled at the close of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya
śrīpritvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḻukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivridhdhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ
kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgevu
ttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṇḍaḷēśvara miriṁjegōkāvipuravarādhīśvaraṁ virōdhimaṇḍaḷikamakarakētana
vriṣadhvajaṁ Aśvaththabhūjadhvaja sūryyavaṁśaprājyarājyalakṣmīśva
ra niśśaṁkalaṁkēśvara parakaḷatraputra kāsyapagōtra Udāttasa
tyavākya saṁpatsurāpagāpatya pulikallāditya pratyartthipārtthivapra
baḷabaḷajaḷadhiśōṣaṇaṁ permmaṭṭipaṟeghōṣaṇa hridyarājavidyāpramu
khanikhiḷakaḷāsaṁcayaviriṁcana vyāghramrigalāṁśchana samuddaṇḍamaṇḍa
ḷikalīlābhirāmaṁ munivarabhīmaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisihitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ daśavarmmadēvarasaru 50 neya viśvāvasusaṁvatsarada
māgha śuddha 1 śukravāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇanimittaṁ tamma rājadhā
ni hoḷalukoṁḍeya śrī brahmēśvaradēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭita
jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ pūjārigaḷaśanāśchādanakkaṁ diṁḍavāgila baṭṭeyiṁ mū
ḍa 40 gēṇa kōlalu biṭṭu nigaraṁ mattarāṟu lekkadiṁ matta 6 dēvariṁ paḍuva Ū
ṭinagaddeya kamma 200 vāviyiṁ baḍaga tōṁṭa 1 gāṇa 1 pūrvvadiṁ baṁda koḍage
voladalu biṭṭa dattiyaṁ pratipāḷisidargge vāraṇāsiyoḷu sāsira kavileyuṁ
sāsira brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phala �yo dharmmamaṁ kiḍisidaṁ gaṁgeya taḍiyalu sāsira kavile
yumaṁ sāsira brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda pāpamakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti
vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhivarṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma
sēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarbbānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . bammeyagāvuṇḍana vadhu ni
rmmaḷaguṇayukte gaṁgegaṁ migilenisi dharmmavegāvuṁḍiye tāṁ brahmēśana nilisi
paḍedaḷī śāsanamaṁ . maḷānaṁdōdayaṁ kāyva mige vibudhasuhriccakracakrāṁkamuśchā
hamanā mādudu ripunripatimiraṁge tējōdayaṁ lōka parbbe tanna(ṁ)nvaya
trutara pūrvvādriyoḷu jātalōkapramadaṁ mārttaṁḍadēvavibhu Udayasidaṁ satya
saṁpaddiḷīpa . kūrttīvanartthijanakaṁ tottiruvaṁ dhuradalānta pagevara balamaṁ katti
yoḷāntaṁgadhikaṁ mārtaṇḍanripaṁge dhareyoḷeṇe vaṁdaparē . śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
